Skip to main content
CAREERS & CULTURE
Our goal is to create excellent entertainment for kids; to make them laugh, to help them learn, and to bring us all closer together… and we love it!
Come Join Our Team
CURRENT VACANCIES
WHAT GUIDES US

9 Story is a vibrant creative organization with locations in Toronto, New York, Dublin and Bali. Making stand out/exceptional content for kids is at the heart of everything we do, and our bar is always set to “excellent” when it comes to the quality of our work. Our studios are highly collaborative spaces, where mentoring and on the job training is built into our daily practices. Our team members benefit from competitive compensation packages, working on award-winning 2D and 3D content, and a thriving work culture and maybe too much cake!

Creativity

You can see it in our walk, our talk, and most of all our WORK! Creativity guides everything we do, and drives us to make amazing content that stands out from the crowd!

Community

Great shows don’t just create themselves, you need great people to make them happen! And our studio is teeming with a talented community of individuals, who strive to improve their work environment and the cities where they live. A community who is always ready to share their knowledge and help others grow.

Communication

It’s essential that people feel they can be themselves. We are creating a culture where candor is not only valued but encouraged. Everyone must feel free to share ideas, opinions and criticisms.

OUR STORY
GAMES
CAREERS
PRESS
CONTACT
VALUES
WHAT WE OFFER
HIRING PROCESS
JOBS
WHAT OUR PEOPLE SAY
CAREERS
SEE OPEN JOBS
VALUES

When we set out to make great games with massive online communities, we knew that we first had to create the ideal environment for building ambitious things. A place where brilliant and inspiring people could come together and build games that make millions of players happy. We realized that we needed to find incredibly talented people and get out of their way. Since then we've paid careful attention to how we like to work together. This is a brief summary of our guiding principles.

HOW WE GET WORK DONE

CURIOSITY IS A SUPERPOWER
The drive to improve always begins with curiosity. We question everything and seek to understand how things work so we can reimagine and remake them even better.

MAKE SOMETHING PEOPLE WANT
We aim to make commercially successful games. That means looking beyond our own preferences to understand what players actually want through research, observation, and listening.

DETERMINED TO ACHIEVE AMBITIOUS GOALS
We set ambitious goals, and find realistic ways to reach them. We write the big goals in pen and the small goals in pencil, revising our plan over and over as we move forward. We don’t wait for perfect resources or perfect timing, we get things done and we’re proud of what we achieve.

THINK, ACT, MEASURE - THEN REPEAT
We think before we act. We take action without waiting for perfection. And we always measure the impact.

	Waitstaff with wine knowledge (FT or PT)
Unpretentious, playful, authentic, kind, unique and a wee bit magical. If that's you, we invite you to join us!

We're looking for waitstaff with wine knowledge who would love to work and build their skills elbow-to-elbow with Chef Patrick Garland.

Chef Patrick has been the mastermind behind the flavourful, rich, market-driven flavours at Absinthe Café since 2006. He won the prestigious Gold Medal Plates competition in Ottawa in 2014, and at the other end of the spectrum, is a two-time winner of the Parkdale Food Centre's "Fork Off!" competition.

His signature dishes, ranging from steak frites to stuffed quail to delicate Parisienne desserts, are always tasty, accessible and leave his guests feeling full and happy.

Waitstaff positions are available as full or part-time. Experience an asset. Bilingual (English/French) is an asset.

To apply, please email your resume to info@absinthecafe.ca or drop into the café at 1208 Wellington Street West in Hintonburg and ask for Emily or Chef Pat.

We look forward to meeting you!

Our Story

Accelera Careers

We’re securing a sustainable future for the industries that keep the world running - and we are powered by people like you.

Accelerate Your Future

We’re focused on understanding your unique talents, skill sets and future goals. As you help us secure a better tomorrow, we're here to help you accelerate your career to the next level.

See all opportunities
Why choose Accelera?
Discover your next move

Our employees work hard, and they deserve to take time for themselves and their families. We provide paid vacation and holidays, parental leave, adoption assistance, flexible work environments and more.

In order to always be innovating, we need to always be learning. Accelera supports employees through tuition reimbursement opportunities and full funding for continued education.

While employees help us secure a sustainable future, we aim to help them secure financial wellness. With 401K and pension plans available, our employees can plan for their retirements and improve their financial future all at once.

Financial Wellness

Building a brighter future is important, but only when we continuously put the wellbeing of our employees first. Accelera offers comprehensive health care benefits to our employees and their family.

Everyone loves a good end-of-year bonus. Accelera employees each receive an annual merit and profit share based on individual and company performance.

Every person
